rag_rules: When validator reports unresolved references, trace the first invalid identifier on the same line and fix the root cause or remove the clause.
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics should guide minimal repairs that preserve unrelated architecture elements.
AGREE annexes must declare visible identifiers before use in assumptions or guarantees.
Repair actions should target only the specific diagnostic issue without altering unrelated components.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component implementations may contain bindings via assignments in annexes.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture elements when the validator reports unresolved identifiers; instead, resolve the root cause or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE contract syntax in component type annexes
